title: Atacames Heat Wave
lead: Atacames is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.51. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Atacames is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and the wind speed is 11.3 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat-related issues. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are likely to be severely impacted, with potential disruptions to daily life and economic activities.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
